title: Starfleet SMP
description: A vanilla+ Modpack with Create. Features a ton of authentic structures, items & game mechanics.
body:
# Stafleet SMP Modpack

This is the Modpack made for the Starfleet SMP Server. 
It's purpose is to have a Vanilla-vibe to it but greatly improve visuals, progression and mechanics.

While you can use it for a singleplayer world, I would recommend using it for a SMP as it includes loads of server stuff that one wouldn't need in a singleplayer world.

Feel free to use it yourself.

![Mountain village generation with dungeon in BG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01e0eef7af29aeae6274c89008e3e5c5c2c53f98.jpeg)

## Version Guide
You can choose between the stable and alpha modpacks. Both will allow you to join the SMP (or another server hosting this modpack) and will only differ in client-side.

### The Alpha Channel
All of the images used here are taken from this version of the modpack. It includes early access versions of Distant Horizons, Iris and Bliss Shaders. When combined they will deliver a visual experience which was thought impossible just a few months ago.

### The Stable Channel
For people who don't want to bother with crashes and bad performance - or who don't care about insane view distance.

## Vanilla meets Create
This modpack made for the Starfleet SMP features Create and a ton of vanilla+ mods to enhance the playing experience and prolong the game progression.

## Much, much better progression - while keeping vanilla playstyle
There are more biomes to explore, more enemies to kill, more colorful mobs to discover and more weapons/gear to grind.

### Enemy mobs
There are a ton of changes to enemy mobs, while not adding many new ones.
Mobs are stronger, more intelligent, more diverse and improve in their skills over time.

![Cave Dweller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2ed82e0bc66941b980f688ead71c9d11b8f8023.jpeg)

### Leveling
You can now level your gear by e.g. killing enemies with your sword - making it stronger. 

### Overworld dungeons
Huge, diverse dungeons spawn in the overworld, ready for you to explore and conquer.
![Huge ships on the ocean, filled with treasures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/764a7618bc1da97ffdfa7b4ead43ecbb51b3b196.jpeg)

### Reworked Deep-dark, Nether, End and Ender Dragon
Previously bland biomes/dimensions get a brand new feel to them with much, much more to explore.
Slay the Ender Dragon like never before with a new End-Island and a more diverse Endboss.

## Exploring Minecraft from a new perspective
### Diverse Biomes and structures
There are more biomes and the terrain generation is greatly improved. There are also a ton more structures to discover and villages have much greater attention to detail.

### Distant Horizons
Included in this modpack are Distant horizon and Iris. Out-of-the-box it will work great - but you can easily improve the visuals by downloading the Alpha version of this modpack which features the new versions of DH and Iris (see above).
![128 Chunks View distance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41e81f375ca460e52198cd6c6d09babd8d2896c0.jpeg)
